commands.name: decode
commands.description: Decode an APK file to a directory of smali and resources
commands.outputFormat: Directory structure with smali/, res/, AndroidManifest.xml, apktool.yml

commands.name: build
commands.description: Build an APK from a decoded directory
commands.outputFormat: Built APK file in dist/ directory

commands.name: install-framework
commands.description: Install a framework APK for resource decoding
commands.outputFormat: Framework file installed to framework directory

commands.name: clean-frameworks
commands.description: Remove installed framework files

commands.name: list-frameworks
commands.description: List installed framework files

commands.name: publicize-resources
commands.description: Make all resources public in an ARSC file

commands.name: info
commands.description: Get APK metadata summary: package name, version, file size, component counts
commands.outputFormat: JSON: {fileName, fileSize, packageName, versionName, versionCode, minSdkVersion, targetSdkVersion, dexCount, hasResources, hasAssets, hasNativeLibs, architectures, permissionCount, activityCount, serviceCount, receiverCount, providerCount}

commands.name: manifest
commands.description: Get decoded AndroidManifest.xml as structured JSON: all components, permissions, SDK info, flags
commands.outputFormat: JSON: {packageName, versionName, versionCode, minSdkVersion, targetSdkVersion, permissions[], activities[{name,exported,intentFilters[],permissions[]}], services[], receivers[], providers[], debuggable, allowBackup}

commands.name: permissions
commands.description: Get list of all permissions declared in AndroidManifest.xml

commands.name: activities
commands.description: Get list of all Activity components with export status and intent filters

commands.name: services
commands.description: Get list of all Service components with export status

commands.name: receivers
commands.description: Get list of all BroadcastReceiver components with export status

commands.name: providers
commands.description: Get list of all ContentProvider components with export status

commands.name: components
commands.description: Get all Android components (activities, services, receivers, providers) in one command

commands.name: sdk-info
commands.description: Get SDK version requirements (min/target/max SDK)

commands.name: resources
commands.description: Get resource table summary: type counts, locales, package info

commands.name: security
commands.description: Get security analysis report: dangerous permissions, exported components risk, risk score
commands.outputFormat: JSON: {dangerousPermissions[], highRiskComponents[], debuggable, allowBackup, usesCleartextTraffic, findings[], riskScore(0-100)}

commands.name: api-surface
commands.description: Get all exported components and their intent filters - the app's public API surface

commands.name: strings
commands.description: Extract all strings from DEX files and resources with optional pattern filtering
commands.outputFormat: JSON: {query, type, totalMatches, matches[{name, value, source}]}

commands.name: signing
commands.description: Get APK signing certificate information: signer, certificates, digests
commands.outputFormat: JSON: {v1Signing, v2Signing, v3Signing, certificates[{subject, issuer, serial, notBefore, notAfter, fingerprints{sha256,sha1,md5}}]}

commands.name: search
commands.description: Search APK content: strings, classes, or methods by regex pattern
commands.outputFormat: JSON: {query, type, totalMatches, matches[{name, value, source}]}

commands.name: diff
commands.description: Compare two APKs: find added/removed permissions, components, version changes
commands.outputFormat: JSON: {addedPermissions[], removedPermissions[], addedActivities[], removedActivities[], addedServices[], removedServices[], versionCodeChange, versionNameChange, targetSdkChange}

commands.name: structure
commands.description: Get code structure overview: class/method/field counts, package distribution
commands.outputFormat: JSON: {totalClasses, totalMethods, totalFields, packageCounts{}, topClasses[], dexCount, dexClassCounts{}}

commands.name: analyze
commands.description: Run comprehensive analysis: all metadata, security, API surface, signing, resources, and structure in one command
commands.outputFormat: JSON: {summary, manifest, security, apiSurface, resources, signing, structure}

commands.name: dex-list
commands.description: List all DEX files in the APK with count

commands.name: locales
commands.description: List all supported locales/regions from the resource table

commands.name: native-libs
commands.description: List native libraries per architecture with file names

commands.name: dex-info
commands.description: Get per-DEX class/method/field statistics

commands.name: apk-info
commands.description: Read decoded APK metadata from apktool.yml in a decoded directory
commands.outputFormat: JSON: {version, apkFileName, usesFramework, usesLibrary, sdkInfo, versionInfo, resourcesInfo, featureFlags, doNotCompress, hasSources, hasManifest, hasResources}

commands.name: resource-packages
commands.description: List resource package groups with IDs, names, and sub-packages

commands.name: lib-frame-packages
commands.description: List shared library and framework package IDs from the resource table

commands.name: uses-libs
commands.description: List shared libraries declared in AndroidManifest.xml

commands.name: manifest-flags
commands.description: Get manifest security flags: debuggable, allowBackup, cleartext traffic, network security config

commands.name: version
commands.description: Show version information

commands.name: apk-version
commands.description: Get APK version information (alias for version on APK files)

commands.name: file-list
commands.description: List all files in the APK with sizes and compression info

commands.name: file-hash
commands.description: Calculate SHA-256, SHA-1, and MD5 hash of the APK file

commands.name: class-info
commands.description: Get detailed info about a DEX class: methods, fields, superclass, interfaces

commands.name: class-list
commands.description: List all class names from DEX files

commands.name: method-search
commands.description: Search method signatures by regex pattern with full type info
commands.outputFormat: JSON: {totalMatches, methods[{className, methodName, returnType, parameters[], accessFlags}]}

commands.name: field-search
commands.description: Search field names by regex pattern with type info

commands.name: asset-list
commands.description: List all files in the assets/ directory

commands.name: dex-strings
commands.description: Extract all strings from DEX files (not resources)

commands.name: permission-detail
commands.description: Get detailed permission analysis with danger level and category classification
commands.outputFormat: JSON: {totalPermissions, dangerousCount, normalCount, customCount, permissions[{name, dangerous, category}]}

commands.name: inheritance
commands.description: Get class inheritance chain (superclass hierarchy) for a given class

commands.name: manifest-xml
commands.description: Get the full decoded AndroidManifest.xml as text (for AI context)

commands.name: serve
commands.description: Start HTTP API server for AI agent integration

commands.name: run
commands.description: Run a JSON script of analysis commands against an APK (shared context, batch execution)
commands.outputFormat: JSON: {apk, totalCommands, successCount, failCount, results{}, errors[]}

commands.name: pipe
commands.description: Read JSON commands from stdin and execute against an APK (suitable for shell pipes)
commands.outputFormat: JSON: {apk, totalCommands, successCount, failCount, results{}, errors[]}

commands.name: ai
commands.description: Generate LLM-ready analysis prompts or structured context for AI-powered APK review

commands.name: help
commands.description: Show help information. Use --format json for AI-consumable output
commands.outputFormat: Text help or JSON command catalog
